message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Youth 1964 (Sylt Study)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1356","justification":"Survey of German youth conducted in 1964 with strong focus on leisure activities, holiday travel, youth camps, and recreational behavior; fits leisure/tourism/sport and youth in 1960s Germany."},{"title":"German Youth 1965 (Sylt Study)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1357","justification":"Follow‑up youth survey in 1965 including questions on leisure time, holidays, travel, and recreational patterns among young people in Germany."},{"title":"German Youth 1966 (Sylt Study)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1358","justification":"1966 wave of the Sylt youth surveys in Germany; includes detailed items on leisure-time behavior, vacation trips, and participation in youth and sports activities."},{"title":"German Youth 1967 (Sylt Study)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1359","justification":"Youth study from 1967 in Germany examining leisure-time interests, holiday trips, and recreational environments of adolescents."},{"title":"German Youth 1968 (Sylt Study)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1360","justification":"1968 youth survey for Germany focusing on leisure-time and recreational behavior, including tourism and holiday experiences of young people."},{"title":"German Youth 1969 (Sylt Study)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1361","justification":"1969 Sylt study of German youth; covers leisure preferences, sports, and holiday/vacation-related behavior among adolescents."},{"title":"German Youth 1963 (Sylt Study)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1355","justification":"Early 1960s German youth survey that includes leisure-time behavior, recreational activities, and holiday experiences of young people in Germany."},{"title":"Youth and Leisure Time 1961","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0018","justification":"West German youth survey from 1961 focusing explicitly on leisure-time behavior, recreational preferences, and use of free time among young people."},{"title":"Youth and Leisure Time 1963","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0020","justification":"1963 study of youth in West Germany with detailed questions on leisure activities, recreational infrastructure, and time use outside school/work."},{"title":"Youth 1969","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0823","justification":"Nationwide study of youth in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1969 including modules on leisure, recreational activities, and attitudes toward holidays and free time."}]}
